# unifi_acl_rule (Data Source)

Look up an existing ACL rule by ID or name. Read-only.

## Example Usage

```terraform
# Look up an ACL rule by name
data "unifi_acl_rule" "example" {
  name = "Block LAN to WLAN Multicast and Broadcast"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Optional

- `id` (String) The unique identifier of the ACL rule. Specify either id or name.
- `name` (String) The name of the ACL rule. Specify either id or name.

### Read-Only

- `description` (String)
- `enabled` (Boolean)
